repo_gap_notes: The old V2 through V4 roadmap is complete and verified, but the product roadmap continues in this repo through V10.
V5 through V10 are planned, not implemented.
External host claims remain matrix-bound: OpenClaw is preview and Claude/Codex/arbitrary external runtimes are unsupported for shipped trust claims.
Identity verification remains a local stub-attestation contract, not hardware-backed or vendor-specific attestation.
Trusted execution is not yet universal external-host trusted execution; future claims must stay evidence-bound.
resume_guardrails: Do not expand host or runtime support claims beyond docs/product/SUPPORTED_HOSTS.md and docs/product/PLATFORM_SUPPORT.md without new evidence.
Treat ROADMAP.md as the single roadmap source of truth.
Keep docs/INDEX.md as navigation only, not a second roadmap.
Preserve version-owned plans under docs/plans/ and version-owned backlog under docs/backlog/.
For V5 work, write the host contract canon spec and plan before implementation.

decisions.decision: Treat V2 through V4 as shipped foundation and V5 through V10 as the next product ladder
decisions.rationale: The repo now has a broader canonical roadmap, so future work should advance that ladder instead of pretending the roadmap ends at V4.

decisions.decision: Treat ROADMAP.md as the single roadmap truth and docs/INDEX.md as the human docs entrypoint
decisions.rationale: The docs IA cleanup established one roadmap source of truth and one navigation entrypoint.

decisions.decision: Keep external host support matrix-bound until each host earns shipped evidence
decisions.rationale: V5 is explicitly built around first-class host certification, not umbrella support badges.

blockers: No canonical V5 host contract exists yet.
Hermes, Claude, and Codex do not yet have host-specific certification lanes.
next_action: Start V5 Loop 0 from ROADMAP.md. Define the canonical first-class host contract, then write the V5L0 spec and execution plan before touching product code.
context_notes: Repo truth now: V2, V3, and V4 are shipped and verified. Post-V4 bridge work is complete. The repo now carries a canonical V5 through V10 roadmap in ROADMAP.md, and the docs tree has been reorganized so product truth lives under docs/product, architecture truth under docs/architecture, operations under docs/operations, plans under docs/plans, specs under docs/specs, and version-owned backlog under docs/backlog. The current product roadmap state is V5 planned, V5 Loop 0 not started.
